name: Idaho vs Utah Workers' Comp Benefit Comparison

mainEntity.name: Idaho vs Utah workers' comp: which pays more for same injury?
mainEntity.text: Idaho vs Utah workers' comp: which pays more for same injury?

acceptedAnswer.text: Utah caps TTD at $860/week (2026); Idaho no weekly cap but shorter duration max.

suggestedAnswer.text: Utah higher rates for high earners, longer temp benefits. Idaho PPI whole person %. Compare based on wages/injury type. Cross-border workers (Boise-Murray) check residency rules.

description: Utah caps TTD at $860/week (2026); Idaho no weekly cap but shorter duration max.
